title: deutzia crassifolia
intro: Deutzia crassifolia, also known as flowering ash or deutzia, is a deciduous shrub native to China, characterized by its white, fragrant flowers and dark green leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Deutzia crassifolia include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in the recovery from infections. Herbal preparations of Deutzia crassifolia include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to leverage its medicinal properties.
